home.headline: Twubaka ejo hazaza
home.sub: AYA Informatica ikora kandi ishyiraho imbuga zinoze zigabanya ubucuruzi, zongera ubufatanye bw'abantu, kandi zihanamura amahirwe y'ubukungu mu mugabane wose.
home.pillarsDesc: Dukora aho ubucuruzi, ikoranabuhanga, n'uburambe bw'abantu bihuza — twubaka sisitemu zigenewe gukura hamwe n'Afrika.
home.approachDesc: Buri gicuruzwa dushyiraho gikurikiza filosofi y'umurimo — cyubatswe ku bantu nyabo, cyubatswe kugira ngo gikure, kandi gishingiye ku kwizera.
home.ctaDesc: Fataanya na AYA Informatica kugira ngo mwubake ibikorwa remezo bya numerike Afrika ikeneye.

footer.tagline: Twubaka ejo hazaza h'ikoranabuhanga rya Afrika uhereye i Kigali, Rwanda.

contact.headline: Twubake
contact.sub: Niba ushaka gufatanya, kubona ibicuruzwa byacu hakiri kare, cyangwa gusa kumenya byinshi — twishimiye kukwakira.
contact.basedIn: Tubarizwa i Kigali, Rwanda — kandi twubakira Afrika yose. Twandikire dutangire ikiganiro.
contact.subject: Insanganyamatsiko
contact.networkErrorDesc: Reba imiyoboro yawe cyangwa utwandikire kuri imeli.

common.errorDesc: Ikosa ritateganijwe ryabaye. Ushobora kugerageza nanone cyangwa gusubira ku rupapuro rw'itangiriro.
common.notFoundDesc: Paji ushaka ntibaho, cyangwa yimukiwe. Reka tukugarure ku nzira nziza.
